note: git init + Electron E2E (node-pty OK under Electron 33, no rebuild) + worktree-mgmt UI + split panes; verified by playwright _electron smoke (split=2, disk round-trip, worktree create)

Project layer: select/open project (native dialog + persisted recent) + per-project worktrees. ProjectStore + isGitRepo TDD'd (23 tests total). E2E projects=2 split=2 roundTrip=true worktreeCreated=true

Wire +agent to real claude CLI via interactive login shell + PtySession.bootstrap (TDD, 24 tests). E2E agentLaunched=true singleAgent=true; real-claude probe printed 2.1.168 (Claude Code) with alias --plugin-dir expanded

Keyboard nav (cmd1-9 worktree, cmd-alt project, cmdW close) + session-layout persistence (LayoutStore TDD, restore on relaunch) + fixed terminal-not-filling-pane bug (addSession now calls layoutPanes). 28 tests; e2e kbdNav restored=3

Draggable split panes (colFr/rowFr + gutters); set xterm font to MesloLGS NF (fix tofu glyphs); fix agent appearing 'gone' after project switch = alt-screen TUI not repainting on reshow -> SIGWINCH nudge. E2E dragResize=true agentAfterSwitch=1

Fix full-screen bottom-line clip (remove xterm height:100% override that made fit overcount rows). Re-clicking +agent now focuses existing agent instead of raw SingleAgentError toast; errMsg() strips IPC wrapper. 28 tests + e2e green

cmux-style UX overhaul: tab bar + on-demand split (single default, cmd-D toggle), notification system (waiting glow/ring + count badge + cmd-shift-U jump), richer sidebar (worktreeStatus dirty/ahead/behind + per-session state & last line), full CSS polish. 30 tests; e2e updated (tabs/split/dragResize all green)

Per user: allow MULTIPLE agents per worktree (removed SingleAgentError invariant), drop task/server kinds (SessionKind=agent|shell, only +agent/+shell buttons), shell now spawns $SHELL -il (zsh login). Numbered duplicate titles. 29 tests; e2e multiAgent=true agentAfterSwitch=2 restored=4

Bundle MesloLGS NF (4 ttf) via @font-face + CSP font-src; load before xterm init -> Nerd/powerline glyphs render without system font. e2e fontLoaded=true. Clarified worktree git badge (dot+N = uncommitted changes) with tooltip + amber color; answers 'why main 6' = git status --porcelain count (matches p10k !5 ?1)

Fix bottom-line clip in split mode: removed .pane padding+border (FitAddon measures pane height but only subtracts xterm padding, so .pane box-model inset overcounted rows). Focus ring now inset box-shadow. Added e2e noClip guard (xterm height <= pane height). e2e noClip=true

Fix main-process crash 'TypeError: Object has been destroyed' at send(): PTY data emitted after webContents destroyed (window close/reload). Guard send() with isDestroyed checks; on window 'closed' kill ptys + null mainWindow. 29 tests + e2e green

Sidebar UX: remove project accordion (selecting/jumping no longer collapses other projects). Independent caret toggle per project; name click = select+expand. Non-active worktrees show session-count badge (blue when pending). e2e green

Migrate renderer to React (react/react-dom + @vitejs/plugin-react). store.ts holds all state/actions/IPC wiring (ported from vanilla main.ts) w/ useSyncExternalStore; App/Sidebar/TabBar/PaneGrid components; xterm managed imperatively via refs, fit via per-pane ResizeObserver + refit on document.fonts.ready (fixed font-metric overflow). core/main/preload + 29 unit tests unchanged. e2e all green via same selectors.

Redesign sidebar to cmux-style flat worktree cards (per user). Lightweight project group label + '+' for new worktree; cards show branch/state/git/last-line, click selects; +agent/+shell moved to top toolbar. init loads all projects' worktrees so cards render; selectWorktree lazily restores. e2e updated to card selectors, all green.

Auto-close session tab when its pty exits (onSessionExit -> closeSession, move focus to sibling). Delay agent bootstrap 400ms so the shell prompt renders at the correct width (fixes wrapped prompt junk at pane top). Note: 'Settings Warning mcp__*' is Claude's own (user's ~/.claude/settings.json), not the app; editing global settings was denied by auto-mode. 29 tests + e2e green.

Clicking +agent/+shell now focuses the new tab AND moves keyboard focus into the new terminal: Pane focuses its xterm whenever it becomes the focused session (covers create + tab switch); addSession already set focusedSessionId. 29 tests + e2e green.

Reduce agent/shell prompt garbage + stray input box: estimate cols/rows from #panes and start the pty near its real size (shell draws first prompt at correct width, no reflow garbage; cursor positioned right). CSS hides xterm helper textarea outline. e2e green.

Launch agents via login NON-interactive shell ($SHELL -lc claude) instead of interactive p10k shell + typed bootstrap -> no shell prompt / no p10k garbage in agent panes. Drop rows estimate (kept cols) to stop bottom-line clip. CCM_AGENT_CMD override still works. Discussed Electron-vs-native tradeoff with user (issues are xterm/PTY teething, not Electron dead-ends). e2e green.

Root-caused the agent 'garbage line': raw pty bytes show claude sends U+2500 (─) box-drawing rules; xterm DOM renderer drew them as garbage letters (E/r/l). Fix: load @xterm/addon-webgl (GPU renderer, correct box-drawing). Caveat: WebGL canvas doesn't capture in screenshots, so visual verification must be manual. e2e (DOM-metric checks) still green.

Switch xterm renderer from WebGL to Canvas (@xterm/addon-canvas): WebGL fixed box-drawing but left new agent panes blank and blanked screenshots. Canvas renders box-drawing correctly (verified via screenshot: solid ─ │ ╭ ╮ ╰ ╯), shows content (no blank), and is screenshot-capturable. Added term.refresh after fit for reliable repaint. 29 tests + e2e green.

Fix claude agent content being pushed to bottom of pane: set node-pty TERM from xterm-color to xterm-256color so claude/Ink uses full-screen redraw and positions content from the top. Verified via real-claude screenshot probe (canvas renderer is screenshot-able). 29 tests + e2e green.

Fix claude's bottom line (auto-mode) being flush/clipped at the pane edge: reserve one row of margin after fit (term.resize rows-1). The user was right there WAS a clipped line. CSS .xterm padding didn't work (xterm canvas is absolutely positioned). Verified via tight bottom-strip screenshot probe: auto-mode line now has a gap below. 29 tests + e2e green. Added npm start.

Fix canvas content shifted down ~20px (user spotted black-vs-gray misalignment). Root cause via DOM probe: canvas-addon layers were position:static and stacked vertically (text layer offTop=20, cursor layer off-screen at 2220). xterm's canvas-positioning CSS wasn't applied. Forced .xterm-screen canvas to absolute/top0/left0 -> topGap/bottomGap now 0. Reverted the rows-1 margin hack (wasn't the cause). 29 tests + e2e green.

Right grey strip on agent pane: FitAddon reserves ~19px scrollbar width (canvas doesn't reach right edge). CSS scrollbar-width:0 didn't change the reserve, so set pane background to #000 so the strip blends with the terminal's black bg (verified via downscaled screenshot: amber rule now spans full width, right area uniformly black). 29 tests + e2e green.

Per user: remove focus-ring border on a single pane (pointless when there's only one). #panes gets a 'single' class when <=1 visible; CSS removes .pane.focused box-shadow then. Kept the ring in split (useful) and kept the .focused class for selectors/keyboard focus. 29 tests + e2e green.

Batch: Settings foundation + appearance + sidebar collapse. settingsStore (TDD, browser-safe settings.ts split for renderer) + settings:load/save IPC; AppSettings holds bg/opacity/transparent/sidebarCollapsed/agents/worktreeFolder/hooks (latter unused yet). SettingsPanel (gear/⌘,), bg colour picker + transparency (window vibrancy + rgba chrome/terminal theme), sidebar collapse (« / ⌘B). Also: worktree card shows folder path (not ·main) + remove-confirm. 33 tests; e2e + screenshot verified.

Fix possible agent-render breakage: terminal now always transparent (allowTransparency + rgba(0,0,0,0)) with the pane providing the bg colour, so applyAppearance only sets CSS vars and never touches live terminals (no canvas blank). Verified agent renders (nonbg=13030) fresh+restored. Moved sidebar-collapse to the left edge of the tabbar with a standard SVG sidebar icon (was « in top toolbar). 33 tests + e2e green.

Agents feature (C+D): AGENT_PRESETS [claude,codex,gemini] with icons; main checks PATH (login shell command -v, cached) -> agents:available returns only installed; '+ agent' hides if none, adds directly if one, dropdown +Claude/+Codex/+Gemini if many. Per-agent launch (req.command), per-agent/shell icons on tabs (Session.icon). e2e updated for dropdown; 33 tests + e2e green; menu verified [★Claude ◆Codex ✦Gemini].

Worktree folder template + create/remove hooks (ccmanager parity). settings.worktreeFolder resolved in main (resolveWorktreePath, {repo}/{branch} placeholders, relative to repo) — renderer no longer hardcodes the path. hookCreate/hookRemove run in a login shell (fire-and-forget) with CCM_WORKTREE_PATH/CCM_BRANCH/CCM_REPO env. SettingsPanel: Worktree section (folder template + 2 hook inputs). CreateWorktreeOptions.path now optional + runtime guard. 33 tests + e2e green (noClip flake on 1st run, green on re-run).

Tab rename (double-click tab -> inline input, Enter/blur commit, Esc cancel; store.renameSession persists via layout). Restore now recovers the agent identity from the saved icon (codex/gemini restore as themselves, not default claude) and keeps the saved/renamed title (addSession titleOverride; SessionDescriptor.icon). 34 tests (+1 layout icon round-trip) + e2e green; rename probe shows '❯ my-shell'.

Configurable keyboard shortcuts (default kitty-style ctrl+shift). settings.keybindings (action->accel) + deep-merge on load. keymatch.matchesAccel (TDD, 5 tests). App keydown handler (capture phase, beats xterm; skips our INPUTs) dispatches splitToggle/newShell/closeSession/next-prevSession/focus-left-right/toggleSidebar; existing Cmd nav kept as fallback. store: cycleSession/closeFocused/newShellInActive. SettingsPanel: Keyboard section (editable accel inputs). 39 tests + e2e green; probe: ctrl+shift+Enter adds shells, ctrl+shift+B splits.

Notification tab-highlight: the wiring already existed (waiting state while unfocused -> pending -> .attention on tab+card). Made the tab .attention visually clear: accent bg tint (color-mix) + bottom accent bar + pulsing dot. Verified via forced-class screenshot.

Project close (not delete): the project x already only removed from recents (repo on disk untouched); added a confirm step ('Close project? (repo kept)') + clearer tooltip so it reads as close, not delete. noClip e2e check is intermittently flaky (timing) - passes on re-run; worth hardening later.

Per-agent enable/disable. Confirmed detection already correct (live app returns [claude,gemini]; codex excluded after user uninstalled it; gemini shows because homebrew gemini-cli is on PATH). Added settings.disabledAgents + Agents section in SettingsPanel (checkbox per preset, shows '— not installed', disabled checkbox when absent). Dropdown = installed AND not-disabled; disabling down to 1 -> direct + agent (no dropdown). Probe: disabledAgents:['gemini'] -> dropdown=0 directBtn=1. 39 tests + e2e green.

User-editable agent list (stop hardcoding presets; gemini-cli->antigravity churn). main resolveAgents() returns settings.agents tagged with installed (commandExists). agentsAvailable IPC now returns ResolvedAgent[]. SettingsPanel Agents section is editable: per-row icon/name/command inputs + install dot (●/○) + remove, plus + Add agent and Reset-to-presets. TabBar dropdown = installed && enabled. Re-resolve install status on settings open/close (avoids per-keystroke shell spawns). 39 tests + e2e green; probe shows 3 editable rows w/ live install dots.

Replace Gemini preset with Antigravity (command 'agy' = user's antigravity CLI, Claude-Code-style flags, on PATH at ~/.local/bin/agy). Migrate legacy single-claude saved agents -> current presets in settingsStore.load (so the user's stale [claude] auto-upgrades). 41 tests (+2 migration) + e2e green; probe with legacy settings resolves [claude●, codex○, antigravity/agy●].

Sidebar UX redesign (designer feedback). Project = clear top level: repo icon + bold name + count badge + divider; worktrees nested under a left rail. Replaced inline confirm bars / bare input with centered modal dialogs (Dialog.tsx): Close project (repo kept), New worktree (titled + explained + labeled field), Remove worktree (explains branch is KEPT by default + optional 'Also delete branch' git branch -D). Backend: removeWorktree deleteBranch option (worktree.test +1). Also fixed settings panel: max-height + overflow-y scroll + sticky header. e2e updated for dialog create flow. 42 tests + e2e green; screenshots verified.

3 fixes from 2nd feedback msg. (1) Settings panel scroll: was unreachable -> max-height+overflow-y+sticky header (probe: scrollable, Keyboard section reachable). (2) Transparency didn't show: construct BrowserWindow with vibrancy:'under-window'+visualEffectState+transparent backgroundColor (runtime setVibrancy alone wasn't enough); AND enabling Transparent now auto-lowers opacity 1->0.82 (100% opacity = opaque even in transparent mode). probe: body rgba(0,0,0,0), pane rgba(...,0.82). (3) Hooks: {worktree}/{branch}/{repo} placeholders now expanded in runHook; clarified labels = command/script/agent-skill with examples (agy -p "/setup"). 42 tests + e2e green.

Move create/remove hooks from global settings to PER-PROJECT (user correction). ProjectStore.update/get + hookCreate/hookRemove on ProjectEntry (TDD +2). project:update IPC. main worktreeCreate/Remove read store().get(repoRoot) hooks instead of global settings. Renderer: ProjectView hooks, upsertProject carries them, updateProjectHooks. New projectSettings dialog (⚙ on each project header) with the 2 hook fields. Removed global hook fields from SettingsPanel + AppSettings. 44 tests + e2e green (flaky, passes on retry); probe: ⚙ opens 'X — settings', hook persists to projects.json.

Visual polish: bigger fonts (sidebar/tabs/toolbar) + replaced ALL emoji/symbol icons with solid monochrome SVGs (Icons.tsx): bell/gear/split/single/plus/chevron/shell/star/hex/sparkle/agent/repo/x. AgentTabIcon maps agent icon char->SVG. Added aria-label to add-session buttons + data-kind/data-icon to tabs (e2e robustness). Tooltips on worktree card indicators (state dot=agent state, count=sessions, wt-status=git changes) to answer 'what is the dot'. 44 tests + e2e green; screenshots verified. NEXT: theme presets to fix agy flat-green-bg + 'bg color should be theme'.

Theme presets (fixes agy weirdness + 'bg color should be theme'). 7 dark themes (Default Dark/Ink/Carbon/Dracula/Nord/Gruvbox/Solarized) each bg+fg. Terminal now gets a SOLID theme background+foreground (not always-transparent) so agents that don't paint a full bg (agy/antigravity) show the theme colour, not a flat fill. Live theme updates work without blanking (probe: afterTheme=149740, paneBg=dracula #282a36) — earlier canvas-blank bug is gone. SettingsPanel: theme swatch grid (Aa preview) + custom bg/text pickers. chrome --panel shades derived from bg via mix(). aria-labels on toolbar icon buttons. 44 tests + e2e green.

Rename app ccmanager-gui -> Grove (user: not based on ccmanager). package.json name=grove/productName=Grove/desc/keywords; package-lock; HTML <title>=Grove; BrowserWindow title=Grove. userData path changes with app name -> migrateUserData() copies settings/projects/layout from old ccmanager-gui folder on first launch. CSP +img-src data:. Designed Grove SVG logo (3-tree grove, green gradient on dark rounded-square) at assets/grove-logo.svg + build/icon.png (qlmanage-rendered). Brand header (logo+wordmark) in sidebar. 44 tests + e2e green; window title=Grove, logo loads. Note: repo FOLDER still named ccmanager-gui (separate from app name).

Fix bottom line flush against pane edge when window enlarged. Re-added rows-1 in refit (reserve one row). This was reverted long ago because it caused a 20px top offset, but that was the canvas position:static bug (since fixed); now rows-1 gives a clean bottom margin with NO top offset. Probe at 1900x1200: topGap=0 bottomGap=17. 44 tests + e2e (noClip still passes, terminal now 1 row shorter than pane).

Major: replace grid-split with VS Code editor groups (user feedback: split unwieldy, jarring focus ring, can't tell tab<->pane). Store: per-wt groups [{ids,active}] (1=single, 2=left|right) replacing splitMode; groupsOf reconciles; visiblePanes=active of each group; toggleSplit moves focused session to a right group / merges back; moveFocusedToGroup; focusGroup. PaneGrid: column layout (no rows), each visible pane placed in its group column, all panes stay mounted (no terminal remount). New GroupTabs: per-group tab strips aligned to columns, focused strip highlighted. TabBar->top bar (global actions only). Removed jarring .pane.focused ring (focus shown on tab strip). Keybindings pruned/updated for groups: focusLeft/Right->focusGroup, +moveToOtherGroup, relabeled. 44 tests + e2e green; probe: strips=2 tabs=[2,1] visPanes=2, screenshot verified.

Tab drag-and-drop between/within editor groups. store.reorderSession(id,targetGroup,beforeId?) moves a session into a group at a position; collapses an emptied source group. GroupTabs: tabs draggable (HTML5 dnd, module-level dragId), strip is a drop target (append) + per-tab drop (insert before); .drop-over highlight. Probe: drag left tab to right strip -> before=[1,1] after=[2] (source emptied->collapsed). 44 tests + e2e green.

Tab rename: shortcut + popup (user wanted it as a popup, not inline). New renameSession dialog kind; store.promptRename/renameFocused open it. GroupTabs: removed inline edit input -> double-click opens the popup. Keybind renameTab (default Ctrl+Shift+R). Dialog project() helper guarded with 'repoRoot' in d (renameSession has no repoRoot). Probe: Ctrl+Shift+R -> 'Rename tab' popup -> tab title changed. 44 tests + e2e green.

Add {timestamp} placeholder to the worktree folder template. Extracted a pure expandWorktreeTemplate(tmpl,{repo,branch,now}) into core/worktree.ts (formatTimestamp -> fs-safe local YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS, no / : space; branch sanitized to [\w.-]); resolveWorktreePath now passes new Date() into it. SettingsPanel placeholders hint + settings.ts doc comment list {timestamp}. +2 vitest tests (timestamp format/no-/:space, branch sanitize). 65 tests + typecheck green. Scope clean (5 Files Touched, nothing outside).

Open HTML/Markdown files in a non-terminal viewer pane (first non-pty surface). SessionKind += 'viewer'; createSession returns early (no pty), input/resize/kill no-op via ptys map. New IPC file:open-dialog + file:read. New markdown.ts (marked + DOMPurify, lazy window-bind) + ViewerPane.tsx (MD -> sanitized div; HTML -> iframe sandbox=allow-scripts, no allow-same-origin). Store openFile/promptOpenFile/browseForFile + openFile dialog + TabBar '+ file' button + DocIcon. Viewer panes excluded from layout persistence. Tests under jsdom (happy-dom mis-sanitized: stripped <h1>, kept onerror -> swapped for jsdom). 67 tests + typecheck + e2e green (fileViewer=true viewerPanes=2 htmlIframe=1 restored=4). Scope deviations: sessionRegistry.ts pass-through (not declared), package-lock.json, e2e/smoke.png artifacts.

Worktree git-diff review pane (code review). SessionKind += 'diff', non-pty early-return generalized to viewer|diff. core worktreeDiff(path,baseRef?) = committed diff(merge-base origin/HEAD|main|master..HEAD) + uncommitted diff(HEAD). Pure diffParse.ts (unified diff -> files/hunks/typed add|del|context lines, HTML-escaped at render). DiffPane.tsx (hand-styled, Refresh btn). IPC worktree:diff. store.reviewWorktreeChanges + shared placePane helper (refactored openFile onto it). Sidebar 'Review changes' button + DiffIcon. Diff panes excluded from persistence. Reused the viewer-pane scaffold from open-html-markdown-files (no dup). 72 tests + typecheck + e2e green (diffReview=true diffAdd=2 diffDel=1). Scope: matches Files Touched; only extra is e2e/smoke.png artifact.

Docs + 2 viewer fixes from user feedback. (1) Wrote root CLAUDE.md (npm, ESM, electron-vite layers, npm-test-is-watch -> npx vitest run, jsdom pragma, IPC-contract-in-3-places). (2) README: embedded docs/screenshot.png (real Playwright capture: shell + rendered README split), added 'Open files in a pane' + 'Review worktree changes' feature bullets + {timestamp} placeholder. (3) FIX: 'Browse' now opens at the worktree folder (fileOpenDialog defaultPath threaded ipc->main->preload->store->Dialog). (4) FIX: markdown viewer relative images (README logo) 404'd -> renderMarkdown(md, baseDir) rewrites relative img src to file:// under the file's dir after sanitize; CSP img-src += file:. +2 markdown tests. 74 tests + typecheck + e2e green; screenshot reshot, logo loads.

Durable agent sessions via tmux CONTROL MODE (tmux -CC): agent survives a Grove restart and reattaches to the live process with zero terminal-UX regression (xterm stays the sole renderer; native scroll/search/selection, no ghosting). Spike proved raw tmux attach is dead (triple-repaint ghosting) and control mode is clean. New core/tmuxControl.ts parser (output/begin/exit, DCS strip, octal-control-only unescape; tmux leaves UTF-8 literal) + pure core/tmuxLaunch.ts (buildTmuxControlLaunch/tmuxSessionName/durableEnabled). settings.durableSessions opt-in (default off) + tmux-absent fallback in durableAgentName; SessionDescriptor.durable marker + snapshot durable flag; index.ts spike replaced by settings-driven control path (input send-keys -H, resize refresh-client -C, kill detach). SettingsPanel toggle + sidebar AnchorIcon badge. Search via documented path (Claude uses xterm alternate buffer, no scrollback to search; searchCoversScrollback helper). 142 tests + typecheck + build + e2e SMOKE_OK; scope clean.

Two worktree sidebar papercuts. (1) Branch-name collision on create now raises a typed BranchExistsError (BRANCH_EXISTS sentinel survives IPC) plus a dialog to use the existing branch or rename, instead of a raw git fatal toast. (2) Worktrees created outside the sidebar (terminal/agent pane) appear live via an add-only reconcileWorktrees() on the 20s meta poll plus window focus, no app restart. +3 core tests; vitest(132)+typecheck+e2e green.
Merged to main (direct, no PR) and pushed in fc7f5a6. Branch-collision dialog + live worktree reconcile.
Merged to main (no PR, merge commit 301eecf) and pushed in fc7f5a6. Durable agent sessions via tmux control mode; all 6 plan criteria passed.

Syntax highlighting in the Changes view via highlight.js (synchronous, self-escaping; preserves the diff renderer's HTML-escape XSS guard) + per-file open-in-IDE: disabled until configured, GUI editors launched via login-shell exec (PATH-correct, no fix-path dep), terminal editors (vim) routed into an in-app shell session via new CreateSessionRequest.bootstrap. New core/ideLaunch.ts + renderer/diffHighlight.ts (both unit-tested), ide:open IPC, ide:{command,terminal} setting + preset/custom picker. All 5 plan criteria passed: vitest 156, typecheck clean, e2e ideOpen=true. Scope clean (diffParse.ts planned but unneeded).
